user.title: Shelly Integrator
user.description: Enter your Shelly Integrator API token to connect to Shelly Cloud.

consent.title: Grant Device Access
consent.description:
Click the link below to grant access to your Shelly devices:

**[Open Shelly Cloud Consent Page]({consent_url})**

You will be asked to log into your Shelly Cloud account and select which devices to share with Home Assistant.

After granting access, click **Submit** below to complete setup.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Shelly Cloud API

init.title: Shelly Integrator Options
init.description:
**Add More Devices:**
[Open Shelly Cloud Consent Page]({consent_url})

**Historical Data Import (Optional):**
If you have a local proxy to your Shelly EM devices, enter the base URL below. Then call the `shelly_integrator.convert_historical_data` service to create import files.

convert_historical_data.name: Convert Historical Data
convert_historical_data.description: Fetches Shelly EM historical data from local gateway and converts it to CSV format compatible with the homeassistant-statistics HACS integration.

gateway_url.name: Gateway URL
gateway_url.description: Base URL of local gateway (overrides configured URL)

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: Optional: Specific device ID to convert (all EM devices if empty)
